brand_identity.name: Shawn Power for Mayor
brand_identity.slogan: The time for debate has passed. The time for action is now.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, py-24, py-32 to give elements breathing room.

grids.platform_section: Mode A 'Tetris' Grid. gap-8. Mix shapes: 1 large dominant feature (col-span-12 md:col-span-8), smaller cards (col-span-12 md:col-span-4). No equal boring squares. Grid children must be direct children.

surfaces.cards: Flat solid surfaces with 1px border (#E5DFD3) and soft ambient shadow. Nested padding p-8.
surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-[#FDFCF8]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5DFD3]) if sticky, or solid #FDFCF8.
surfaces.footer: Deep Forest Green (#1E392A) background with off-white text for high contrast. py-24.

hero_texture.description: Warm terracotta and sage abstract texture

candidate_portrait.description: Professional silhouette placeholder for Shawn Power

components.buttons: Shadcn based. Primary buttons use Terracotta (#CC5A37) with hover text-white. No generic blue rings. Generous px-8 py-6.
components.forms: Inputs use organic borders (#E5DFD3) with #CC5A37 focus rings. Labels are left-aligned, Outfit font. Forms must sit on a distinct surface (like an off-white card) for contrast.
components.navigation: Sticky nav with glass effect. Must include visible desktop links (Home, About, Platform, Get Involved, Contact) and an action-oriented 'Donate' CTA button.

sections_to_build.name: Hero
sections_to_build.description: Large slogan, river background with gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#1E392A]/70 to-transparent), primary CTA 'Join the Movement'.

sections_to_build.name: About
sections_to_build.description: Candidate portrait placeholder, bio text space, focus on warmth and community roots.

sections_to_build.name: Platform
sections_to_build.description: Bento grid for 5 points (Planning Commission, Taxes, Veterans, Bypass Road, Centennial Bridge Sidewalk).

sections_to_build.name: Get Involved
sections_to_build.description: Volunteer sign up form (integrated with DB/state) and Donation/E-transfer info section prominently displayed.

sections_to_build.name: Footer/Contact
sections_to_build.description: Phone (506-778-9410), Email (powerformayor@gmail.com), Facebook icon link, large typography.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient text-shadow or gradient underlay.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='volunteer-submit-button', data-testid='nav-about-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React .js (not .tsx) project. Write standard modern JavaScript.
Import and use Playfair Display (headings) and Outfit (body) via Google Fonts in index.css.
Do NOT use typical blue/red tech/political colors. Stick to the earthy palette provided (Terracotta, Sage/Forest Green, Warm Sand).
For the Get Involved form, use customized HTML/Tailwind form elements or Shadcn form primitives customized to match the warm color scheme.
Do not use generic Shadcn Cards everywhere. Use custom HTML divs for the Platform Bento grid to allow asymmetry.
Use the exact media URLs provided in this JSON. Do not use placeholder services.
Implement smooth scrolling (Lenis) if possible to add weight.
Use lucide-react for icons (Facebook icon for social media link).
